## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Spec-TDD checklist

- [ ] Spec written in `docs/specs/` with enumerated test cases
- [ ] Failing tests committed before implementation
- [ ] All enumerated test cases have a matching test
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] No production code without a failing test that justifies it

## Security

- [ ] No secrets in code
- [ ] Input validated at boundaries
- [ ] RBAC enforced for protected actions
